notes.scope: Program-related subject-ranking proxy; QS and THE do not publish rankings for most individual sustainability master's programs.
notes.qs_coverage: QS subject pages were collected through the published top 150, with a second page through approximately the top 300 for subject-years needed to resolve unmatched programs; complete tables were used when shorter.
notes.the_coverage: Complete official THE subject-ranking JSON tables were collected.
